title: First light over Rivermouth
premise: An orientation beat in the start region.

stages.narration: For a moment the street is just a street — grey light, gulls somewhere, the river smell under everything. Then you see the abandoned cars nosed up on the kerb, the smashed pharmacy grille, and it settles back over you: this is the shape of things now.

choices.label: Take a breath and get your bearings
No time for it — keep moving

notes: Low-stakes tone-setter; scope run so it lands once.
